\section*{Book IV Universal Source --- L4 Generated Shell}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Book IV L4 Shell}

\noindent\textit{Book IV establishes the universal source object $\mathbf{U} \in \mathrm{POT}$: it exists (Thm.~IV.5.1), is unique (by factorization role), and every lawful realization factors through it (\texttt{cor:IV.descendants-factor}). This pilot completes the full spine dependency chain.}
